description: SEO MCP over Search Console, GA4, PageSpeed Insights, Cloudflare, IndexNow, CrUX, technical-SEO.
name: io.github.avansaber/seo-monster

environmentVariables.description: Path to your Desktop-app OAuth client-secrets JSON, downloaded from Google Cloud Console. Required for Search Console, Indexing, and GA4 tools.
environmentVariables.name: SEO_MCP_GOOGLE_OAUTH_CLIENT

environmentVariables.description: Writable path where the cached OAuth token is stored. On first use, a browser opens for one-time consent and the token is written here. Default: ${HOME}/.config/seo-monster/token.json
environmentVariables.name: SEO_MCP_GOOGLE_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Default Search Console property, e.g. 'sc-domain:example.com' or 'https://www.example.com/'.
environmentVariables.name: SEO_MCP_GSC_DEFAULT_SITE

environmentVariables.description: Default GA4 property, e.g. 'properties/123456789' or bare '123456789'.
environmentVariables.name: SEO_MCP_GA4_PROPERTY_ID

environmentVariables.description: Google API key shared by PageSpeed Insights and Chrome UX Report History tools. Optional; both work anonymously at a tighter rate limit when unset.
environmentVariables.name: PSI_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Cloudflare API token. Optional; needed only for the Cloudflare tools. Scopes: Zone:Read, DNS:Read, Account Analytics:Read, and (only when destructive mode is on) Cache Purge:Purge.
environmentVariables.name: CF_API_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: IndexNow shared key (any 8-128 hex string you generate). Required only for the IndexNow tools. Host the key file at https://<your-host>/<key>.txt for engine verification.
environmentVariables.name: SEO_MCP_INDEXNOW_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Override the default IndexNow key-file URL (https://<host>/<key>.txt). Set only if you host the key file at a non-standard path.
environmentVariables.name: SEO_MCP_INDEXNOW_KEY_LOCATION

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to enable the Cloudflare cache-purge tools. Default false: all destructive tools refuse to run.
environmentVariables.name: SEO_MCP_ALLOW_DESTRUCTIVE
